ownerDID.description: The wallet/account DID that approved this node

nodeDID.description: The device DID that was approved

networkRecordId.description: The mesh network record ID the node was approved into

memberRecordId.description: The owner/member record that owns this node

memberDateCreated.description: dateCreated timestamp for the member record

nodeDateCreated.description: dateCreated timestamp for the node record

expiresAt.description: When this node membership expires; omitted means never expires

approvedAt.description: When the owner approved the node

requestRecordId.description: The owner-scoped request record this approval satisfies
